subject: fix: critical and high-priority audit fixes (C1-C5, H1-H10)
body:
Critical fixes:
- C1: Remove unconditional dark class in main.jsx that overrode flash
  prevention script, causing light mode users to see dark flash
- C2: Validate ?data= URL param — restrict to http/https schemes only,
  preventing SSRF via file://, data://, or internal network URLs
- C3: Replace postMessage wildcard '*' with document.referrer origin;
  add height bounds check and source validation in embed.js
- C4: Route ErrorBoundary errors to debug pill via __debugPushError
  so section-level crashes are visible without DevTools
- C5: Individual try/catch per month file fetch with user-facing warning
  listing which months failed to load (was silent data loss)

High-priority fixes:
- H1: Add viewport-fit=cover and safe-area-inset padding for notch/home
  indicator on iOS devices
- H2: Increase filter mode toggle button padding from 2px to 6px with
  min-height 32px (was far below 44px touch target)
- H4: Add security headers to vercel.json (X-Content-Type-Options,
  X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy) with CORS exception for embed.js
- H5: Route SW registration errors to debug pill
- H6: Wrap Header, TabBar, FilterSidebar, DetailPane, SettingsPane in
  ErrorBoundary so crashes don't blank the entire app
- H7: Replace TESTING_GUIDE dark mode toggle + private mode sections
  (features that don't exist) with actual theme test scenarios
- H8: Update CLAUDE.md dark mode status from "Partial" to "Implemented"
- H9: Update USER_GUIDE.md theme section to reflect light/dark support
- H10: Add Projects tab to QuickGuide onboarding tour

Tags: security, a11y, debug, documentation, bug
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: audit-fixes
Semver: patch
